---
applyTo: "apps/web/src/**/*.mjs"
---

# Web Server Code

## Architecture

The web server is in `apps/web/src/server.mjs` and uses `node:http` directly. It serves six routes:
- `/` — public marketing page
- `/member` — authenticated member portal
- `/admin` — restricted admin console
- `/activate` — account activation page
- `/reset` — password reset page
- `/meetings/rsvp` — meeting RSVP confirmation

Static assets are served from `apps/web/public/` at `/assets/*`.

## Templates

HTML is generated by pure JavaScript functions in `apps/web/src/templates.mjs`. There is no template engine (no EJS, Handlebars, etc.).

- Each page has a `renderXxxPage(config)` export that returns an HTML string.
- All pages use the shared `htmlLayout({ title, body, appBaseUrl, currentPath, pageClass })` function.
- Use `escapeHtml()` for any dynamic values inserted into HTML to prevent XSS.
- The `UI_BUILD` constant at the top of `templates.mjs` is a cache-buster version string for static assets.

## Navigation

- Top-level navigation: Public (`/`), Member Portal (`/member`), Admin Console (`/admin`).
- Member and admin pages use module-level deep links with hash fragments: `#events`, `#imports`, `#notifications`, `#reports`, `#birthdays`, `#sms`, `#celebrations`.
- Use `data-member-module-link` and `data-admin-module-link` attributes on navigation anchors.

## Config

`getWebConfig(env)` from `apps/web/src/env.mjs` provides: `host`, `port`, `apiBaseUrl`, `appBaseUrl`. The web server does not access the database directly — it renders HTML shells that call the API from the browser.

## Accessibility

- All pages include a skip-link (`<a class="skip-link" href="#main-content">`).
- Navigation uses `aria-current="page"` for the active route.
- Use `aria-label` on sections and interactive elements.
- Maintain keyboard focus states and contrast compliance.

## Styles

Styles live in `apps/web/public/styles.css`. The file includes responsive breakpoints at 900px, 760px, and 480px. Changes to layout must be tested across breakpoints.
